full_text:
Zhang Bo 張伯
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Bo (張伯). Leader in the Yingchuan region, defeated and killed by Fu Xie. Zhang Bo was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Zhang Bo lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
